title: Flickingeria forcipata

The genus Flickingeria is a part of the subtribe Aeridinae, which is a large and widespread group of orchids. Flickingeria forcipata is a species of orchid endemic to Asia. It is further classified into the subfamily Epidendroideae, which includes many species of orchids.
